name: Cherry Cinnamon Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 12 3/8 ounces reduced fat refrigerated cinnamon rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare an 8-inch round cake pan with cooking spray.
3. Pour pie filling into prepared pan.
4. Separate cinnamon rolls and dip the edges in melted margarine.
5. Then, dip the edges in chopped walnuts.
6. Arrange the rolls, topping side up, onto the pie filling.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
8. In a small bowl, combine lemon peel and icing from the cinnamon rolls.
9. Spread over warm rolls.
